scripts.bootstrap: pnpm --filter @yhangry/api run db:generate && pnpm --filter @yhangry/api run db:push && pnpm --filter @yhangry/api run seed
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,magenta "pnpm --filter @yhangry/api run dev" "pnpm --filter @yhangry/web run dev"
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @yhangry/api run typecheck && pnpm --filter @yhangry/web run typecheck
